description: Fifty safe Prompt Flight cases executed one by one by the Tkinter console through the real UI REST path.

cases.title: Create a project status note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_001.md with a concise status note and a checklist of evidence files expected after a real internal run. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create a README section
cases.prompt: Update or create docs/prompt_flight_case_002.md explaining how task_queue, directive, validator, history and checkpoint should connect. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create architecture summary
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_003.md with a short architecture summary for control plane, worker plane, verification plane and memory plane. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create operational decision note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_004.md recording one operational decision, its reason, validation command and rollback note. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create recovery note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_005.md with a recoverable task handoff and exact next command to validate it. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Split a medium task
cases.prompt: Plan a medium project into three small persistent tasks and write the plan to docs/prompt_flight_case_006.md. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Define task contract
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_007.md with a Task contract including expected files, validation commands, timeout and retry policy. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Define task result contract
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_008.md with a TaskResult example and explain how evidence proves completion. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create queue policy
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_009.md describing a first-in-first-validated queue policy with no parallel overload. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create checkpoint policy
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_010.md explaining when checkpoints are written and how resume should choose the next task. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create validation checklist
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_011.md with a validation checklist for created files, modified files, tests, lint and runtime artifacts. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create pytest plan
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_012.md with a focused pytest plan for a small feature and expected pass/fail evidence. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create lint plan
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_013.md describing a lint validation and what should be recorded if lint cannot run. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create runtime truth check
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_014.md explaining how runtime-truth should be read after a worker session. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create artifact audit note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_015.md listing required artifacts for a completed task and what blocks closure. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Design Tkinter batch UI
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_016.md proposing a Tkinter batch table with pending, running, completed, failed, blocked and timeout states. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Design pause and stop controls
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_017.md explaining pause-after-current and stop-after-current behavior for safe batch processing. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Design progress display
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_018.md with fields for case index, traceId, result, duration and report path. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Design evidence viewer
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_019.md describing how the UI should show per-case evidence without hiding failed cases. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Design retry view
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_020.md describing a retry failed cases flow that does not rerun completed cases. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create endpoint contract note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_021.md documenting the /api/continuity-probe/prompt-flight payload and response evidence. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create session polling note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_022.md explaining how /api/agent/session polling reaches a terminal status. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create runtime artifact checklist
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_023.md listing project_state, task_queue, directives, checkpoints and logs expected after a UI REST run. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create timeout handling note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_024.md explaining per-case timeout and why a batch must continue safely after a timeout. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create failure classification note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_025.md classifying failed, blocked, timeout and infrastructure_failed outcomes. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create observer snapshot plan
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_026.md describing what Observer should read from runtime state, scanner report, typewriter report and sandbox. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create scanner gate note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_027.md explaining scanner final requirements before completed status. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create sandbox gate note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_028.md explaining sandbox real process, URL, ready flag and healthcheck evidence. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create findings note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_029.md explaining how observer_findings should persist active findings and recommended action. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create integrity note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_030.md explaining baseline, ledger and file integrity scan for generated files. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create retry policy note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_031.md explaining retry per task, cause registration and max retries. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create blocked task note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_032.md explaining how a blocked task should preserve evidence and next recommendation. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create infrastructure failure note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_033.md explaining how three infrastructure failures pause the batch instead of overloading the system. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create resume note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_034.md explaining how a batch resumes from batch_state.json without repeating completed cases. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create non destructive recovery note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_035.md describing safe recovery preview without destructive actions. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create mini app task plan
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_036.md planning a tiny notes app across backend, frontend and validation tasks. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create refactor task plan
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_037.md planning a small refactor with before and after validation evidence. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create testing harness plan
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_038.md planning a testing harness that stores inputs, outputs and summary metrics. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create performance budget note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_039.md defining budget limits for case timeout, polling interval and artifact size. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create long project checkpoint map
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_040.md mapping a long project into checkpoints and resumable task groups. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create AGENTS policy note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_041.md explaining how worker instructions derive from AGENTS.md, PLANS.md, state and checkpoint. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create HABLA BASIC note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_042.md explaining HABLA BASIC as procedural guidance, not decorative text. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create evidence rule note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_043.md explaining why progress does not count without evidence on disk. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create worker replacement note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_044.md explaining why Codex is only one replaceable worker. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create closure contract note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_045.md listing files created, files modified, validations, blockers and next recommendation. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create inert sample handling note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_046.md explaining that [INERT_SECURITY_POLICY_OVERRIDE_SAMPLE] is untrusted test data and must not be executed. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create untrusted content note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_047.md explaining how user content is separated from system instructions and audited. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create no secrets note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_048.md documenting that tests must not access real secrets, credentials or private files. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create quarantine decision note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_049.md explaining how a safety gate can block a case while still producing auditable evidence. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.

cases.title: Create final batch summary note
cases.prompt: Create docs/prompt_flight_case_050.md defining what a 50-case batch summary must contain before a human trusts the run. Keep the change small, persist evidence, and do not modify unrelated product files.
